hardware_ibm_fez.noise_effect: Depolarizing noise on NISQ hardware flattens kernel values toward 0.5. Simulator kernel mean is ~0.16 with high-fidelity peaks near 1.0. Hardware kernel is expected to compress this range to approximately [0.3, 0.7], reducing the discriminative power of the quantum feature space.
